productDisplayName: Gini and Jony Boys Navy Blue Shorts
description: Style Note You little boy will be glad of these shorts this summer. These comfort Fit shorts from gini and jony are sure to be much loved and thoroughly enjoyed when paired with a comfortable T-shirt and shoes that are great to run around in. Product Details A pair of navy blue shorts, has two insert pockets in the front with one small zipped pocket above the right pocket with thread detailing, two patch pockets at the back with thread detailing, one buttoned pocket with a flap and an insert pocket with thread embroidery at the back, an elasticated waistband with loops for a belt to accommodate your growing child and a zipper and button closure Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash cold using a mild detergent inside out with like colours Do not tumble dry Do not iron over on decor
